messages.content:
Once an order is processed, it cannot be modified, including changes to the shipping address. If the order is shipped to the wrong address, it may be returned to the sender if undeliverable. You can also contact the shipping carrier with the tracking information to see if they can assist in redirecting the package.

If you have any other questions or need further assistance, feel free to ask!
